pca_decision: SKIPPED -- only 1 numeric pre-game feature (mmr); faceted distribution by selectedRace x highestLeague used instead

sql_queries.spearman_all:
SELECT
    MMR,
    APM,
    SQ,
    supplyCappedPercent
FROM replay_players_raw
WHERE result IN ('Win', 'Loss')
  AND SQ > -2147483648
sql_queries.spearman_rated:
SELECT
    MMR,
    APM,
    SQ,
    supplyCappedPercent
FROM replay_players_raw
WHERE result IN ('Win', 'Loss')
  AND SQ > -2147483648
  AND MMR > 0
  -- I7: mmr > 0 filter excludes zero-sentinel rows (83.65% of data,
  --     census: MMR_zero = 37489)
sql_queries.pregame_faceted:
SELECT
    MMR,
    selectedRace,
    highestLeague,
    result
FROM replay_players_raw
WHERE result IN ('Win', 'Loss')
  AND MMR > 0
  AND selectedRace IN ('Prot', 'Zerg', 'Terr')
  -- I7: exclude empty-string (1110 rows), Rand (10), BW* (3) per census
  -- I7: MMR > 0 excludes zero-sentinel (37489 rows, 83.65%)
